default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on SEO strategy and prioritize immediate actions for new content.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Fix Blog Indexing:** The blog's "oldest-first" sort order is causing slow Google indexing. The fix is to sort by "newest-first" and add publish dates to improve crawlability.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [**Prioritize New Sales Page:** Backlink efforts for "sales roleplay software" will be paused to concentrate all link equity on a new, high-priority Sales AI Roleplay page launching within two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [**Optimize Existing Pages:** On-page SEO edits for the `/ai-roleplays` page will be implemented first, deferring a potentially disruptive URL slug change. The `/platform` page will be re-optimized for "Learning Experience Platform."](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [**Launch New Content Sprints:** Exec will build new landing pages for key head terms (e.g., Sales Enablement, L\&D) using existing design blocks to accelerate creation.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)

## Topics

### Blog Indexing & Content Strategy

  - [**Problem:** New blog articles are not being indexed quickly by Google, requiring manual submission.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The blog's "learn series" pages are sorted "oldest-first," hiding new content from Google bots and making the site appear stale.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [**Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
      - [Change the sort order to "newest-first" on all blog category pages.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
      - [Add publish/refresh dates to article snippets for better crawl signals.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
      - [Increase articles per page from 5 to 8–10 to expose more content.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [10 new comparison articles (e.g., "MindTickle Alternatives") were published.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [Production will increase to 12 articles/week to build a buffer for the holiday season.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [Garett will review all comparison articles to ensure Exec's positioning is strong and CTAs are prominent.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

### Backlink & On-Page SEO Strategy

  - [**New Backlink Strategy:** Shift from general homepage links to a focused, bottom-up approach targeting specific landing pages with unique anchors.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [**Immediate Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
      - [**Sales AI Roleplay Page:** Pause backlink efforts for "sales roleplay software" to focus all link equity on a new, high-priority page launching within two weeks. Garett has sent the draft copy to Jo for on-page SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
      - [**Existing AI Roleplays Page (`/ai-roleplays`):** Implement on-page SEO edits first. A URL slug change to `/ai-roleplay-software` is deferred to avoid disrupting existing links, but remains an option if initial optimizations are insufficient.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [**Coaching Platform Page:** This page is a good candidate for backlink efforts in the interim.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [**Keyword Intent:** To avoid ranking for unrelated "roleplay" topics (e.g., cosplay), all content will use corporate/business-focused language to signal clear intent to Google.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)

### Future Content & Information Architecture

  - [**Head Term Expansion:** Exec will create new landing pages or blog posts for high-intent head terms identified by GrowthX and Garett.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [**Initial Focus:** Sales-related terms (Enablement, Onboarding, Training) and industry-specific terms (L\&D, Customer Support).](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
  - [**Execution:** Exec will use existing design blocks to accelerate page creation.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [**Platform Page Re-optimization:** The `/platform` page will be re-optimized for "Learning Experience Platform" (LEP) to align with a recognized industry category.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This positions Exec within a familiar framework for buyers and allows for better directory listings.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
      - [**Action:** Update page content and consider changing the URL slug from `/platform` to `/learning-experience-platform` since the page has low existing link equity.](https://fathom.video/share/jemiXCcpSRsEhaJMWTn1FN6UADFZFyT_?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
